hero.title: China truck parts, sourced and checked by a dedicated export team.
hero.subtitle: crealink helps truck parts buyers in Africa, Middle East and South America quickly check reference prices for SINOTRUK, SHACMAN, FAW and other China truck brands – then turn your parts list into a clean RFQ.

search.title: Quick truck parts price check
search.example: Example: SINOTRUK / HOWO / SHACMAN / FAW truck parts.
search.noResults: No parts found for "{{query}}". Please try another number or keyword, or send us your RFQ.

parts.referenceNote: Reference prices in CNY (RMB), EXW China (for indication only)

about.title: Why work with crealink?
about.subtitle: We are a light-asset export team in China focused on truck parts, not a general trading marketplace.

footer.region: China-based export team for Africa, Middle East, South America.
